recipe.title: Recipe ideas
recipe.hint.fromList: The AI looks at what is already on your list and suggests 3-5 dishes you could cook with it. Missing ingredients can be added with one click.
recipe.hint.fromName: Tell the AI what you want to cook (dish + number of servings). It will produce a shopping list with the right quantities that you can add to the current list.
recipe.need.items: Your list is empty. Use the other tab to look up a recipe by name.
recipe.fromList.prompt: {n} items on your list. Let the AI suggest recipes you could cook with them.
recipe.haveAll: ✓ You already have all ingredients on your list!
settings.delete.title: Delete account
settings.delete.description: Your lists, items, loyalty cards and shares will be permanently deleted. Shares you granted to others are also removed.
settings.delete.confirm.title: Really delete your account?
settings.delete.confirm.warning: This cannot be undone. The following will be removed:
settings.delete.confirm.bullet.lists: All your shopping lists, items and categories
settings.delete.confirm.bullet.shares: Shares you granted to other users (they lose access)
settings.delete.confirm.question: Do you really want to continue?
settings.delete.code.title: Enter confirmation code
settings.delete.code.instruction: We sent a 6-digit code to your email address. Enter it here to complete account deletion. The code is valid for 15 minutes.
